metadata.title: JU — throw something good
metadata.description: Make an event, share a link, watch the yeses roll in. Guests RSVP without an account.

home.subtitle: Make an event, share one link, and watch the yeses roll in. Your guests RSVP in seconds — no account, no app.
home.note: Hosting needs an account; guests never sign in.

auth.tagline: Make an event, share a link, watch the yeses roll in.
auth.guestNote: Hosting is account-only. Guests don't sign in — they just open your invite link and RSVP.
auth.checkEmailBody: We sent a sign-in link to <highlight>{email}</highlight>. Open it on this device to continue.
auth.spamHint: Don't see it? Give it a minute, then check your spam or promotions folder.

expired.title: That link didn't work
expired.body: Sign-in links expire and can only be used once. Ask for a fresh one and you'll be right in.

cancelled.title: Sign-in was cancelled
cancelled.body: Looks like the sign-in window was closed before it finished. No harm done — give it another go.

server.title: Couldn't complete sign-in
server.body: Something went wrong on our side completing your sign-in. Try again in a moment.

empty.title: No events yet.
empty.body: Create your first event, publish it, and share the link — guests RSVP without an account.

eventForm.newSubhead: Fill in the essentials, publish, and share the link. Guests RSVP without an account.
eventForm.liveBanner: Your event is live. Share this link — guests RSVP without an account.
eventForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Drinks, a playlist, and a view. Come through.
eventForm.collectRsvpsHint: — turn off to just share the details
eventForm.chipInBlurb: Splitting the cost? Drop a payment link — guests see it on the page. We don't handle the money.
eventForm.visibilityPublicHint: Anyone with the link can see it and RSVP.
eventForm.visibilityPrivateHint: Only people you send the link to. Never publicly listed.
eventForm.passwordPlaceholder: Guests type this to see the details
eventForm.saveFirstThenCover: Save the event first, then add a cover
eventForm.coverFormats: PNG, JPG, or WebP · up to {size}MB

hostEvent.publicLinkHint: Public link — guests RSVP without an account.
hostEvent.fullNotice: This event is full — new replies join the waitlist. Promote a waitlisted guest below to open their spot.
hostEvent.noReplies: No replies yet. Share the link to get the first RSVP.
hostEvent.waitlistHint: In line if a spot opens. Move someone up when there’s room.
hostEvent.unpublishConfirm: Moving to draft makes shared links 404 until you publish again. Continue?
hostEvent.cancelConfirm: Cancelling shows guests a 'cancelled' notice and stops new RSVPs. Continue?
hostEvent.deleteConfirm: Deleting is permanent — all RSVPs and comments are removed too. Delete?
hostEvent.draftLinkHint: This event is still a draft — the link only works for guests after you publish.

settings.title: Your details
settings.description: Your name shows on events you host. Your username is your public profile at <handle>{path}</handle>.
settings.usernameClearWarning: Clearing your username removes your public profile at <handle></handle> and breaks every link you've shared to it.
settings.usernameClearConfirm: Yes, remove my public profile and break those links.
settings.usernameClearBlocked: Confirm you want to remove your public profile before saving.

eventPage.rsvpToSeeAddress: RSVP to see the exact address.

rsvp.disabledNotice: The host turned off replies for this one — keep an eye here for updates.
rsvp.intro: Reply to save your spot — no account needed.
rsvp.introFull: This event is full — reply to join the waitlist. No account needed.
rsvp.contactPlaceholder: So the host can reach you
rsvp.errorCheckForm: Check the form and try again.
rsvp.errorTooMany: Too many tries — wait a moment and try again.
rsvp.errorSaveFailed: Couldn’t save your RSVP. Try again.
rsvp.errorSaveWrong: Something went wrong saving your RSVP. Try again.
rsvp.errorNetwork: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.
rsvp.confirmWaitlisted: You’re on the waitlist — we’ll let you know if a spot opens up.
rsvp.confirmGoing: You’re in 🎉 Update your reply anytime below.
rsvp.confirmMaybe: Marked as maybe — change it anytime below.
rsvp.confirmNotGoing: Got it — you’re not going. You can change your mind below.
rsvp.confirmDefault: Your reply is saved. Update it anytime below.

feed.noRepliesYet: No replies yet — be the first to RSVP.
feed.hostOnly: Only the host can post here.
feed.errorPostFailed: Couldn’t post your comment. Try again.
feed.errorNetwork: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.
feed.pickDatePrompt: Check every date that works for you.
feed.pickDatePromptLocked: Vote on when this should happen — RSVP first to weigh in.
feed.errorVoteFailed: Couldn’t save your vote. Try again.
feed.datePollHintTbd: Offer a few dates and let guests vote. Lock one in when you’re ready — votes are kept.
feed.datePollHintLocked: You’ve locked in a date. You can still adjust the candidates below.
feed.noDatesYet: No dates yet. Add the first option below.

password.label: This event is password protected
password.errorTooMany: Too many tries. Wait a moment and try again.
password.errorMismatch: That password didn’t match. Try again.
password.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.

organizer.emptyBody: When this host publishes a public event, it shows up here. Private events stay off the profile.

route.body: That didn’t load. It’s usually a blip — try again, and if it keeps happening, come back in a bit.

global.body: The app hit an unexpected error. Try again — that usually clears it.

notFound.title: We couldn’t find that.
notFound.body: The link might be mistyped, or the host took the event down. Double-check the link, or head back to the start.
